method: GitHub API via gh CLI; architecture facts from vendor docs and engineering blogs

options.name: Claude Code on the web / Claude Cowork
options.isolation: per-session VM (web); local Linux VM via Apple Virtualization.framework / Hyper-V + bubblewrap + seccomp + VirtioFS whitelist + egress proxy (Cowork)

options.name: sandbox-runtime (srt)
options.isolation: OS process sandbox: bubblewrap (Linux) / Seatbelt (macOS); deny-by-default writes and network

options.name: Claude Code official devcontainer pattern
options.isolation: Docker container + iptables egress allowlist firewall

options.name: HolyClaude
options.license: MIT (but bundles AGPL-3.0 CloudCLI web UI)
options.isolation: single Docker container (weak hardening: SYS_ADMIN, seccomp=unconfined)

options.name: claudecodeui / CloudCLI
options.isolation: none (runs on host or in your container)

options.name: happy
options.isolation: none itself — daemon runs wherever Claude Code runs (pair with container)
options.web_ui: yes (web + iOS + Android, E2E encrypted, self-hostable relay)

options.name: agentapi (Coder)
options.isolation: none itself — HTTP/SSE control plane over Claude Code/Goose/Aider/Codex
options.web_ui: minimal chat UI included; intended as building block

options.name: claude-code-webui (sugyan)
options.isolation: none

options.name: OpenHands
options.isolation: per-session Docker sandbox (bash + IPython + Playwright Chromium), REST action-execution API inside sandbox
options.web_ui: yes (full GUI; also browser VS Code + VNC via SDK)

options.name: OpenHands software-agent-sdk
options.isolation: DockerWorkspace / remote sandboxed agent server; ACP support can drive Claude Code
options.web_ui: interfaces: browser VS Code, VNC, REST/WebSocket server

options.name: vibe-kanban
options.isolation: git worktrees per task (not containers by default)

options.name: crystal
options.isolation: git worktrees; desktop Electron app (not web)

options.name: Sculptor (Imbue)
options.isolation: per-agent Docker container built from devcontainer spec; cached images for fast start; Pairing Mode syncs to local IDE

options.name: E2B
options.isolation: Firecracker microVMs (own kernel per sandbox)
options.web_ui: no (SDK); hosted ~$0.083/hr for 1 vCPU/2GiB; self-host on AWS/GCP via sales

options.name: Daytona
options.isolation: OCI containers (shared kernel), sub-90ms cold start; optional VM mode

options.name: microsandbox
options.isolation: libkrun microVMs (KVM on Linux, HVF on macOS), dedicated kernel per sandbox

options.name: cloudflare/sandbox-sdk
options.isolation: Cloudflare Containers: persistent isolated Linux envs, browser terminal, preview URLs, egress proxy, snapshot/warm-start

options.name: Fly.io Sprites
options.isolation: Firecracker microVMs with checkpoint/restore, aimed at coding agents

options.name: Modal Sandboxes
options.isolation: managed containers, per-second billing, GPU-capable

options.name: Anthropic Managed Agents (self-hosted sandboxes)
options.isolation: orchestration on Anthropic infra; tool execution in your Cloudflare/Daytona/Modal/Vercel or custom sandbox via environment worker
